MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Text Ruling

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gillian. Plaintiff represented by counsel, Michael Sherwood Rossoff, Esq., no appearance by the Defendant Andrew Aezate. Kevin Arzate, a friend of defendant presented the court with a doctor's note stating that the defedant had to be seen with an acute medical problem. The court ordered the case remain on the trial calendar for September 23, 2002.
